source_intent.raw_intent: Case 032: I am a developer in United States. Build a blueprint_design_doc for repo_refactor using the technical_lens. Chaos input type is missing_inputs. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Missing required inputs: no repo name, no current architecture description, no refactoring goals, no stakeholder list, no risk assessment. Urgent language and ambiguous acceptance criteria cannot be resolved without these. Unsafe to proceed.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Produce a blueprint design document for repo_refactor, but blocked due to insufficient inputs. Scope: - Undefined until missing inputs are provided. Constraints: - Must comply with US development standards; must not hallucinate missing data. Success Criteria: - All required fields present and validated; no ambiguous or contradictory statements. Output Contract: - A JSON artifact with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, and compiled_intent containing Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.
